purpose: Hidden style-only reference for Mimo character generation. It communicates the approved family proportions, pixel geometry, face language, palette restraint, and voxel-depth treatment; it is not an identity reference or an output layout template.

construction.method: Deterministic rasterization of the idle character data from the three project design-handoff components.

handoff.note: The earlier zip contains LuLu and the UI design references, but not the later Clawd and Nat component files. The full three-character handoff directory is authoritative for this board.

runtimeMirror.note: The app already mirrors these three handoff data packs in its generic mascot renderer.

recommendedUse.promptInstruction: Use this image only for Mimo's family resemblance: compact cute proportions, readable face, restrained palette, and crisp dimensional pixel treatment. Preserve the uploaded subject's identity and distinctive features. Do not copy LuLu, Clawd, or Nat; do not reproduce multiple characters, the three-column composition, baked shadows, UI, labels, or this background.
recommendedUse.identityPriority: The user's uploaded subject and an approved master-character image must take priority over this board.
recommendedUse.outputBackground: Continue requesting a single flat #F1ECE2 matte with generous edge clearance for deterministic local extraction.
